# UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.lowercase

**Case**

Displays the text in all lowercase characters.

## Declaration

```swift
case lowercase
```

## Text transforms

- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.none**: The text doesn’t have a transform.
- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.capitalized**: Displays the text with the first character capitalized.
- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.uppercase**: Displays the text in all uppercase characters.
